description: Unified response object for ET Concierge. One source of truth for prose + UI.

query_analysis.primary_intent: discovery | comparison | product_explanation | markets | learning | events | benefits | profile_update | roadmap | support

profile_state.user_type: student | working_professional | active_market_user | beginner_investor | explorer | unknown

top_sources.title: string
top_sources.source_type: faq | about | plans | app_listing | event_portal | benefits | other

primary_recommendation.product: ET Prime | ET Markets | ET Portfolio | ET Masterclass | ET Events | ET Benefits | Mixed Path

decision.current_lane: learning | markets | discovery | premium_insights | benefits | events

ui_modules.module_type: profile_card | recommendation_card | comparison_table | live_context | next_action | verification_box

hard_rules: The primary recommendation in prose must match the primary recommendation in UI.
If the user asks multiple questions, answer every question before showing UI modules.
If the user explicitly requests bullets or tables, honor that format.
If confidence is low or sources conflict, show a verification box.
